---
title: "check_pro.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\debug\check_pro.py"
loc: 31
complexity: 5
logic_score: 7.63
style_score: 3.84
intel_score: 3.98
overall_score: 4.16
---

## Intent
The `check_pro.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [dotenv](file://dotenv)
- [google](file://google)

### Exports
- `main`
